<?xml version="1.0"?> <rule version="1">   <pattern>free \(\w+\) .* \* \1</pattern>   <message>     <id>cwe_416</id>     <severity>warning</severity>     <summary>Use of pointer after free detected</summary>   </message> </rule>

<?xml version="1.0"?> <rule version="1">   <pattern>malloc \(.*\) (?!.* free \()</pattern>   <message>     <id>cwe_401</id>     <severity>warning</severity>     <summary>Memory leak detected: allocated memory is not freed.</summary>   </message> </rule>

<?xml version="1.0"?> <rule version="1">   <pattern>free \( (\w+) \) .* free \( \1 \)</pattern>   <message>     <id>cwe_415</id>     <severity>warning</severity>     <summary>Duplicate free of the same pointer detected, which can lead to undefined behavior.</summary>   </message> </rule>

<?xml version="1.0"?> <rule version="1">   <pattern>return \w+ \+ \w+ ;</pattern>   <message>     <id>cwe_190</id>     <severity>warning</severity>     <summary>Potential integer overflow in arithmetic operation.</summary>   </message> </rule>

<?xml version="1.0"?> <rule version="1">   <pattern>int\s+\w+\s*;\s*if\(\s*\w+\s*>\s*0\s*\)\s*\{.*\}\s*return\s+\w+;</pattern>   <message>     <id>cwe_457</id>     <severity>warning</severity>     <summary>Uninitialized variable used in return statement.</summary>   </message> </rule>

<?xml version="1.0"?> <rule version="1">   <pattern>arr \[ idx \+ \d+ \]</pattern>   <message>     <id>cwe_125</id>     <severity>warning</severity>     <summary>Out-of-Bounds Read detected. Accessing array element outside its bounds.</summary>   </message> </rule>
